title: Bee Removal in North Merrick, Long Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in North Merrick, Long Island. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Same-day service available. Call now for $350-$550 bee removal.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout North Merrick, Long Island, ensuring the safe and humane extraction of bees from residential and commercial properties. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges posed by bee infestations in Long Island communities and respond quickly to protect your family and property. With pricing ranging from $350 to $550, we offer transparent, competitive rates for complete bee removal and prevention.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served North Merrick and surrounding Long Island communities for years with certified, experienced bee removal specialists who prioritize safety and environmental responsibility. We offer same-day emergency service, use eco-friendly methods that preserve beneficial bee populations when possible, and provide comprehensive follow-up to ensure colonies don't return to your property.
localContext: North Merrick's mix of single-family homes, tree-lined streets, and proximity to parks and green spaces creates ideal conditions for bee colonies to establish themselves in attics, wall voids, and eaves. From properties near North Merrick Community Park to homes along Merrick Avenue and the surrounding residential neighborhoods, our team knows the local architecture and common nesting sites that attract bees in this Nassau County community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee emergency in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for bee removal emergencies in North Merrick and throughout Long Island. Our team typically arrives within 2-4 hours of your call, depending on the severity of the situation and our current schedule. For active swarms or bees inside living spaces, we prioritize immediate response to ensure your safety.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 price range include for bee removal?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal pricing includes a thorough inspection to locate the hive, safe removal of the entire colony, extraction of honeycomb and debris, sealing of entry points to prevent re-infestation, and cleanup of the affected area. The final cost depends on factors such as hive size, location accessibility, structural complexity, and whether any minor repairs are needed after extraction.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we partner with local beekeepers to safely relocate honeybee colonies rather than exterminating them, recognizing their environmental importance. However, in cases involving aggressive species, heavily damaged structures, or immediate safety concerns, removal may be necessary. We assess each situation individually and recommend the most appropriate and safe solution for your North Merrick property.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have a bee infestation in my North Merrick home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include seeing large numbers of bees entering and exiting a specific area of your home (especially eaves, vents, or siding gaps), hearing buzzing sounds within walls or ceilings, noticing honey stains on walls or ceilings, or finding dead bees inside your home. If you observe consistent bee activity in one location, especially during spring and summer months, you likely have an established hive that requires professional removal.
